title: AI Workflow Automation System
title_cn: AI 工作流自动化系统
description: Build AI workflow automation in NocoBase with triggers, AI nodes, and flexible process configuration.
description_cn: 通过 NocoBase 搭建 AI 工作流自动化系统，支持触发器、AI 节点等流程配置。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — AI Workflow Automation System: native workflows with AI-employee nodes and an execution flow. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/11-ai-workflow-automation.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— AI 工作流:原生工作流 + AI 员工节点和执行流程视图。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型:https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/11-ai-workflow-automation.html
